findings.summary: README declares metaswarm premium defaults, but AGENTS omits that default and only describes configurability.
findings.details: README states metaswarm 'uses premium child-model overrides by default,' while AGENTS only says commander model is configurable via --model/--models. This leaves default premium policy under-specified across docs.

findings.summary: Baseline model-default wording is inconsistent between docs.
findings.details: README documents a concrete default --model value (claude-haiku-4.5) for stampede.sh usage, while AGENTS describes worker/merger model defaults as 'default model in your Copilot CLI session.' These can both be true but are not harmonized and may confuse expected runtime defaults.
